text.title: seo-basics Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for seo-basics as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Measuring Core Web Vitals only in Lighthouse lab mode
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Lighthouse runs in a controlled lab environment; Google's ranking uses field data from Chrome User Experience Report (CrUX). A passing Lighthouse score can coexist with failing field CWV if real users have slower devices or connections.
